notes:
Session 14 (Opus 4.7, 1M ctx) — added the ModelsLab provider end-to-end, plus several ParamsPanel generalizations that benefit any future non-fal image provider.

=== WHAT WAS ADDED ===

NEW FILES (src/providers/modelslab/):
  - client.ts — lazy Community singleton, throws if VITE_MODELSLAB_KEY missing
  - upload.ts — uploadBase64ToUrl() hits POST /api/v6/base64_to_url; http URLs passthrough; 5MB cap, 24h URL expiry
  - models.ts — MODELSLAB_MODEL_IDS tuple + MODELSLAB_MODELS[] with {id, api, supportsI2I?}. Currently ['flux-klein' (v6-community, supportsI2I: true), 'wan-2.7-t2i' (v7-text-to-image, supportsI2I: false)]. Permissive default: absent supportsI2I = assumed supported. Grow the tuple to add more models; getModelslabModel(id) drives runtime routing.
  - pipelines.ts — runModelslabT2I (routes v6 via Community SDK OR v7 via direct POST /api/v7/images/text-to-image), runModelslabI2I (v6 only), custom pollForResult with eta-respecting first wait + 'Try Again' transient retry + typo-aware extractMessage (modelslab returns `messege` not `message` on failures), resolveOutput handles success/failed/error statuses and string|array output, fetchAsMedia retries 404 up to 10×3s for predicted R2 URLs + probeImageDimensions for correct gallery aspect, IMAGE_SIZE_MAP translates preset tokens → width/height, roundTo8 normalizes /8 for v6, safety_checker: 'no' baked into v6 body
  - index.ts — one Model `modelslab/image` auto-routing t2i/i2i based on params.input_images[0] + supportsI2I gate (permissive). z.enum(MODELSLAB_MODEL_IDS) dropdown for model_id. image_size enum instead of width/height sliders. strength slider with multipleOf(0.05), guidance_scale multipleOf(0.5).

registry.ts — modelslabProvider added to `providers` array.

package — installed modelslab@1.4.0 via `pnpm add modelslab --config.store-dir=/home/motithewizerdlab/.local/share/pnpm/store/v10` (needed the store override because running from VSCode's zsh had a different default store than the terminal zsh).

=== TOUCHED FILES (shared/cross-cutting) ===

  M src/features/generation/useRunJob.ts — dispatch gate added: `usesFalImageShell = model.providerId === 'stub' && model.kind === 'image'`. Only the stub shell triggers the fal flat-imageModels lookup + pipeline dispatch; every other image-kind provider (modelslab, future) routes through model.run() via the registry path. This was a REAL blocker — without this gate, opening a modelslab tab would silently hijack into the fal pipeline.

  M src/features/generation/components/GenerationTab.tsx — threads `providerId={model.providerId}` prop to ParamsPanel. Removed the tabbar-header thumbnail strip (moved near the prompt, see below). Removed unused `X` import and `updateParams.input_images` closure.

  M src/features/generation/components/ParamsPanel.tsx — lots of generalization:
    • New `providerId?: string` prop; `isFalImageShell = providerId === 'stub' && modelKind === 'image'`.
    • Mode dropdown + fal model picker + persona widgets all gated on isFalImageShell (previously gated on the weaker `imageModels.length > 0` which was always true).
    • Image size preset dropdown moved OUT of the fal-only block — now renders for any `modelKind === 'image'` provider (both fal and modelslab use the same `values.image_size` token).
    • New ZodEnum branch in FieldRow renders a Dropdown — generic, benefits any future schema with an enum field.
    • `showUploadButton = isFalImageShell ? supportsEdit : modelKind === 'image'` — all non-fal image providers always get the upload button (tried an i2i-gate but Moti pushed back; runtime silently falls back to t2i for models that don't support images, so UI doesn't need to hide anything).
    • Thumbnail strip moved INTO ImageUploadButton component (above the button) — so attached images sit right under the prompt instead of in the sidebar header. Removed duplicate from GenerationTab.
    • HANDLED_BY_CUSTOM_UI skip list in collectFields: `image_size`, `input_images`, `mask_url`, `loras` — prevents the auto-form from rendering these as text inputs since they're handled by dedicated widgets above.

  M src/providers/images/models.ts — `enable_safety_checker: false` added to every fal model's fal_extra_input. Existing safety_tolerance values on FLUX 2 Pro ('5') and FLUX Kontext Max ('6') preserved. RISK: some fal endpoints (vendor-wrapped ones like Nano Banana / GPT Image / Grok / Ernie) may 422 on unknown fields per session 13 notes — monitor and remove per-model if anything breaks.

=== MODELSLAB QUIRKS LEARNED ===

  1. `flux` model_id on v6 community is a BROKEN/generic model that ignores prompts — returned heart-sculpture stock imagery for a 2261-char face prompt. Moti's dashboard has specific working variants like `flux-klein`.
  2. v6 fetch endpoint returns `status: 'failed', messege: 'Try Again'` as a TRANSIENT 'not ready, poll again' signal — NOT a real failure. Typo `messege` not `message`.
  3. v6 submit returns `eta` in seconds — we now wait that full duration before the first poll instead of the flat 3s.
  4. v6 predicts R2 URLs before the asset is actually written — fetching returns 404 for ~10-30s. fetchAsMedia retries 404s (not other errors) up to 10 × 3s = 30s backoff.
  5. v7 docs only spec `prompt`, `key`, `model_id` — we send only those (no width/height/etc). v7 polling URL (/api/v7/images/fetch/{id}) is NOT documented; we mirror v6's pattern and log the URL on failure.
  6. Width/height must be divisible by 8 on v6 — roundTo8() normalizes silently so the UI slider value stays user-friendly.
  7. Init_image uploads use POST /api/v6/base64_to_url (data URIs only; http URLs passthrough).
  8. Auth is via body `key` field (docs) — SDK also sends Bearer header redundantly; we send only the body key on direct fetch calls.
